summary: TaxiG Platform - Iteration 4 Testing. Verified new features: Rating system, Document upload, Admin document verification, Browser notifications. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: All dashboards working correctly with Navy+Orange theme.
critical_code_review_comments: Rating system fully implemented: POST /course/{id}/rate, GET /course/{id}/rating, GET /chauffeur/{id}/rating all working
Document upload working: 3 document types (permis_conduire, permis_sejour, piece_identite) with file validation
Admin document verification working: approve/reject functionality with status updates
Browser notifications implemented in ChauffeurDashboard polling (line 475) using Web Notifications API
Rating dialog appears in ChauffeurDashboard after completing course (driver rates client)
Rating dialog appears in ClientCourse.jsx when course is completed (client rates driver)
Navy Blue (#0A1628) + Orange (#FF6B00) theme correctly applied across all pages
seed_data_creation: Test documents uploaded via backend tests for TAXI001 driver
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: 1) Rating system with backend endpoints and frontend dialogs in both ChauffeurDashboard and ClientCourse, 2) Document upload with 3 types and admin verification, 3) Browser notifications in driver polling. Navy+Orange theme applied correctly.

frontend_components: ChauffeurDashboard rating dialog (lines 1370-1427) - driver rates client after completing course
ClientCourse.jsx rating dialog (lines 369-421) - client rates driver when course completed
details.validation: Stars 1-5 required, comment optional, duplicate rating prevented

details.frontend: Documents view in ChauffeurDashboard (lines 1251-1309) shows all 3 types with status badges
AdminDashboard documents dialog (lines 860-920) with approve/reject buttons

details.trigger: When new course request arrives during polling

driver_login.details: Login successful, redirects to dashboard with map

driver_dashboard.details: Map displays with OpenStreetMap tiles, menu shows Documents option, Navy+Orange theme

driver_documents_view.details: Shows 3 document types with status badges (En attente/Validé/Refusé) and upload buttons

client_dashboard.details: Map displays with 44 active chauffeurs, booking panel visible, Navy+Orange theme

admin_chauffeurs_list.details: Shows Note (rating) column with star icons, documents button (Eye icon) for each chauffeur

theme_verification.details: Navy Blue (#0A1628) + Orange (#FF6B00) theme correctly applied across all pages

polling_verification.details: 3-second polling interval stable, uses refs to prevent interval reset on GPS updates, browser notification sent on new course
